examples: The dreamer, the joyous oarsman, lay on his back at the bottom of the boat, his heels in the air.
The oarsman found that the he had to pull against the tide.
Mark was an oarsman and had to spend all day below deck rowing.
There are various inlets where visitors can rent a rowing boat or hire an oarsman to take them to the mysterious rock known as Zhumbaktas stone.
You need not be an experienced oarsman to get in on the fun: a few minutes training on the first day will teach you all you need to paddle a kayak safely and comfortably with a guided group.
